title: Grumbling in the Ranks
description: Word travels fast in the Warrens. You haven't paid your people on time, and resentment is building. A Compact inspector has taken notice.

outcomes.message: A goodwill bonus quiets the complaints for now.
The complaints are ignored. The Compact files a note.

title: A Gilded Messenger
description: A courier in House Aurevaine livery arrives with a sealed letter. The Court proposes a meeting — on their terms. You are not foolish enough to think this is a kindness.

outcomes.message: You attend. The Court notes your cooperation — and your face.
The messenger leaves without a word. The silence is its own answer.

title: Scouts Report Movement in the Corridor
description: League outriders have spotted a large beast-pack moving through the Green Corridor approach roads. Convoys are halting. The city will feel it within days.

outcomes.message: The League thanks you. The Corridor is placed under watch — disrupted but not closed.

choices.label: Keep it quiet — not your problem

outcomes.message: The pack hits a convoy two days later. The disruption spreads.

title: A Ring Offer
description: A Tallow Ring broker makes contact through a ward intermediary. They have goods — restricted documents, unlicensed medicine, salvage that didn't make the League manifest. The price is fair. The paperwork doesn't exist.

outcomes.message: The goods arrive wrapped in waxcloth. No receipt, no record.
You decline. The broker nods and disappears into the Pale.

title: A Petition from the Warrens
description: Three Restored community organizers wait in your anteroom. They represent a tenement block in the Warrens facing eviction by a Compact-linked landlord. They are asking for help — money, testimony, or a distraction that buys them time.

outcomes.message: The Restored accept your help quietly. Word will spread — in the right places.
They leave without comment. Another door that didn't open.

choices.label: Report the meeting to the Compact

outcomes.message: The Compact thanks you. The Restored learn who talked. The Warrens remembers.

title: Supply Shortage in the Harbor
description: A dockworkers' dispute has halted three incoming trade barges. Shop prices in the Harbor Ward are climbing. It won't last more than a week — but this week it matters.

choices.label: Buy supplies before prices peak (60 Marks)

outcomes.message: You buy in. The supplies arrive before the worst of the spike.
The prices bite. You manage, but the margin is thinner than you would like.

title: League Safety Inspection
description: The Foundry League has sent inspectors to the Ironworks district. Any operation with wall-adjacent contracts is being reviewed. Your permits are current — but inspections have a way of finding things.

outcomes.message: The inspectors leave satisfied. The League marks your file as cooperative.
A small consideration changes hands. The inspection concludes quickly.

title: Injury Complications
description: An old wound has reopened. One of your people is in worse shape than the healers first thought. They will recover — but it will take time and rest.

outcomes.message: The medic works through the night. Recovery time halved.
They rest. It takes longer, but they pull through.

title: The Hollows Watches Back
description: The Hollows does not welcome strangers. As you enter, eyes track you from doorways and alley mouths. Someone here knows your business before you do.

outcomes.message: You move through without incident. The Hollows lets you pass — this time.

choices.label: Make contact with a local broker

outcomes.message: A name exchanged, a coin offered. The Hollows has noted you as someone worth knowing.

title: The Pale Keeps Its Silence
description: The Pale is Court territory in everything but name. Gilded Heights money flows here quietly. A minor functionary intercepts you at the gate — politely, professionally, with a list of questions you were not expecting.

outcomes.message: The functionary nods, makes notes. Your cooperation is recorded.

choices.label: Deflect — you are here on private business

outcomes.message: The functionary steps aside without a word. The Court will remember the deflection.

title: A Knife in the Dark
description: One of your own has turned against you. They have carried your secrets to your enemies. The damage is already done.

outcomes.message: You file the betrayal away. Names are remembered.

title: A Reliable Hand
description: One of your people has been consistent — steady work, no complaints, no departures. They have not asked for recognition and they will not. But they have noticed whether you have.

outcomes.message: The bonus is delivered without ceremony. The work continues — better than before.
You say something brief. They nod. Neither of you makes more of it than it is.
The moment passes. They noticed.

title: Someone Is Close to Breaking
description: One of your people is running on nothing. The strain has been visible for days and it has not improved. If this continues, the work will suffer — or they will simply stop showing up.

choices.label: Give them two days off — no assignments

outcomes.message: They take the time. They come back steadier. The gap in the roster costs you, but less than a breakdown would have.

choices.label: Pay for proper rest and a physician (25 Marks)

outcomes.message: The physician signs off in two days. The rest does the rest. They return without the hollow look.

choices.label: Push through — the work does not wait

outcomes.message: The work continues. So does the damage. You will deal with the consequences when they arrive.

title: Shipment Without a Manifest
description: A rare cargo arrived in the Harbor Ward last night ahead of any announced schedule. The dock broker is selling quickly and quietly before the Compact inspectors arrive. The price will not last the morning.

outcomes.message: The goods clear the dock before the inspection. The investment was sound — the materials arrive and the margin holds.
You decline. The cargo moves without you. Someone else made the margin.

title: The City Trembles
description: Stability in Valdenmoor is critically low. Riots have broken out in the outer districts. Your operations may be affected.

choices.label: Dispatch a team to restore order

outcomes.message: Your team moves into the outer districts. Order is restored — for now. The Compact takes note.
You keep the house doors shut. The riots burn themselves out by morning.

title: Rivals Move
description: A rival organization has seized control of a district market. Competition for contracts will be fiercer.

outcomes.message: The market slips from reach. You file it away and move on.

title: Noted.
description: Word reaches you that the Gilded Court has taken an interest in your rebuilding efforts. Whether that is opportunity or threat remains unclear.

outcomes.message: You let them watch. The Court makes notes. That costs something, eventually.

title: A Note from Marion
description: Marion leaves a folded note on the table before you wake.

outcomes.message: Marion leaves a folded note on the table. *I have been watching your back since the Breach. I will not stop now.*

title: Marion Intercepts You
description: Marion catches you before you leave. She does not ask. She tells.

outcomes.message: Marion catches you at the door. "The city is wrong tonight. You are not going alone. Do not argue." You do not argue.

title: Ida Sharpens Her Blade
description: Ida sharpens her blade loudly in the common room. She is not subtle about it.

outcomes.message: Ida sharpens her blade loudly in the common room. "Just making sure I am still useful around here." She does not look up.

title: Ida Drops Supplies
description: Ida returns with provisions no one asked for. She calls it practical, not generous.

outcomes.message: Ida drops a sack of dried provisions on the table. "Picked these up. Do not make it sentimental." She leaves before you can thank her.

title: Verek Returns from the Pale
description: Verek comes back from the Pale. He does not explain. He rarely does.

outcomes.message: Verek returns from the Pale in silence. He sets three Marks on the table without explanation. He sits down and pours himself a drink.

title: Verek Passes Notes
description: Verek slides a folded paper across the table. Routes, timings, names.

outcomes.message: Verek slides a folded paper across the table. Routes, patrol timings, two names circled in red. He says nothing. He does not need to.

title: Rutha Reviews the Terms
description: Rutha Kael reviews her arrangement carefully. She makes notes.

outcomes.message: Rutha reviews her contract terms in the corner, making notes in the margin. She looks up once. "If the terms change, tell me before it matters. Not after." She returns to her notes.

title: Rutha Mentions Thornwall
description: Rutha mentions the Thornwall Incident. Once. Obliquely.

outcomes.message: Rutha cleans her blade and speaks without looking up. "The job changed. Nobody told us until it was too late." She does not say which job. She does not need to.

title: Sable Checks the Load-Bearing Walls
description: Sable Wrent is inspecting the building again. She has opinions.

outcomes.message: Sable traces a crack in the corner wall with two fingers. "This joint was poured wrong. League saved coin. We are the ones who pay if it shifts." She makes a note. You suspect the League is on another list somewhere.

title: Aldric on Manners
description: Aldric Vane observes the room. He has thoughts on presentation.

outcomes.message: Aldric watches you interact with a contact and says afterward, quietly: "You have the right instincts. The diction wants work. I can help with that, if you would like." He does not say it is for his benefit too. He does not need to.

title: Dara Mentions a Route
description: Dara Slink returns from a run and mentions something useful in passing.

outcomes.message: Dara drops her satchel and says, almost to herself: "The Harbor Ward gate on Splinter Street — second guard changes at the second bell. Good time to move things." She is already eating before you can ask what things.

title: Oswin on the Distribution Problem
description: Oswin Farr has been thinking about food routes again.

outcomes.message: Oswin spreads a hand-drawn map on the table — distribution points, Compact checkpoints, the gap between them. "We could feed three more blocks if this route were clear." He has the names of who blocked it last time. He adds them to his list.

title: Cress Treats an Injury
description: Cress Aldmoor tends to something without being asked.

outcomes.message: Cress notices the cut on your forearm and says nothing — just takes your arm and begins cleaning the wound. When she finishes she says: "You should have had this done yesterday." That is all. That is enough.

title: Tav Returns from the Register
description: Tav comes back from his quarterly register check. He does not mention it.

outcomes.message: Tav comes back from his quarterly register check and sets down his pack without a word. After a moment he says: "They asked about you. I said you keep your accounts in order." A pause. "That is the truth."

title: Maret Finds a Record
description: Maret Sunne has found something in the permit archives that she considers notable.

outcomes.message: Maret sets a copied page on the table — a sealed Compact filing from three years ago, reclassified twice. "The record is complete," she says. "What you do with it is your concern." She means it as information, not permission.

title: Lirien Speaks of Her Father
description: Lirien Ashcroft mentions her father. She does not ask for help. Not yet.

outcomes.message: Lirien says, without preamble: "My father is still at the estate. The informal arrest continues. The Court considers this a courtesy." A short pause. "I do not." She does not ask for your help. The door she leaves open is deliberate.

title: Whispers from the Pale
description: Whispers in the Pale: a Collectors ledger-keeper was found dead in The Tangle. The debt books were missing.

outcomes.message: Whispers in the Pale: a Collectors ledger-keeper was found dead in The Tangle. The debt books were missing.

title: Word from the Iron Docks
description: Iron Docks foremen posted new work boards overnight. The rates are lower than last season.

outcomes.message: Iron Docks foremen posted new work boards overnight. The rates are lower than last season.

title: Movement Near the Old Annex
description: A hooded figure was seen entering the Pale Court's old annex. The building has been sealed for two years.

outcomes.message: A hooded figure was seen entering the Pale Court's old annex. The building has been sealed for two years.

title: Turned Back on the Ashfields Road
description: Three merchants on the Ashfields road reported their convoy was turned back by armed strangers — no faction markings.

outcomes.message: Three merchants on the Ashfields road reported their convoy was turned back by armed strangers — no faction markings.

title: Something in the Tangle
description: The Tangle's usual silence broke last night. Screaming, then nothing.

outcomes.message: The Tangle's usual silence broke last night. Screaming, then nothing.

title: Torn Notices at the City Market
description: Guild notices at The City market were torn down before dawn. Someone doesn't want them read.

outcomes.message: Guild notices at The City market were torn down before dawn. Someone doesn't want them read.

title: Fire at the Foundry Quarter
description: A fire gutted a warehouse in the Foundry Quarter before dawn. No League investigation has been announced. Two dockworkers have not reported for shift.

outcomes.message: A fire gutted a warehouse in the Foundry Quarter before dawn. No League investigation has been announced. Two dockworkers have not reported for shift.

title: Compact Census Takers
description: Civic Compact census takers have been moving through the Warrens asking about household numbers. Some doors were not answered. Some were nailed shut.

outcomes.message: Civic Compact census takers have been moving through the Warrens asking about household numbers. Some doors were not answered. Some were nailed shut.

title: A Broker Goes Quiet
description: Word from the Tallow Ring's usual contacts: one of their mid-tier brokers has gone quiet. No one's looking for her. That's the worrying part.

outcomes.message: Word from the Tallow Ring's usual contacts: one of their mid-tier brokers has gone quiet. No one's looking for her. That's the worrying part.

title: The Old Bridge Groans
description: Stone-setters flagged three new cracks in the Old Bridge span. The League filed the report. The Compact has not responded. The bridge carries forty wagons a day.

outcomes.message: Stone-setters flagged three new cracks in the Old Bridge span. The League filed the report. The Compact has not responded. The bridge carries forty wagons a day.

title: A Gilded Court Auction
description: House Aurevaine is auctioning a confiscated estate in the upper ward. Attendance is by invitation only. No list of invitees has been made public.

outcomes.message: House Aurevaine is auctioning a confiscated estate in the upper ward. Attendance is by invitation only. No list of invitees has been made public.

title: New Faces at the Pale
description: The Pale Court has been seen speaking with young men at the gate markets. Not scholars. The kind who carry weight well and ask few questions.

outcomes.message: The Pale Court has been seen speaking with young men at the gate markets. Not scholars. The kind who carry weight well and ask few questions.

title: Bread Prices Up in the Warrens
description: Bread prices in the Warrens jumped two marks overnight. No explanation from the bakers. A League distributor was seen at the market before the stalls opened.

outcomes.message: Bread prices in the Warrens jumped two marks overnight. No explanation from the bakers. A League distributor was seen at the market before the stalls opened.

title: Compact Patrols Rerouted
description: The Compact's night patrol route through the Tangle has been quietly rerouted. No announcement. The streets it no longer covers are not empty.

outcomes.message: The Compact's night patrol route through the Tangle has been quietly rerouted. No announcement. The streets it no longer covers are not empty.

title: An Unscheduled Vessel
description: An unscheduled vessel docked at the Iron Docks just before curfew. It unloaded in under an hour. No manifest was posted. The League watchman on duty has taken leave.

outcomes.message: An unscheduled vessel docked at the Iron Docks just before curfew. It unloaded in under an hour. No manifest was posted. The League watchman on duty has taken leave.
